top_signals.title: Oil price back at prewar levels as Gulf flows pick up
top_signals.summary: Brent crude drops below the $72.48 a barrel it traded at in late February before Iran conflict erupted
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ECB reports on progress towards euro adoption
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lingyi iTech Rises in Hong Kong Debut
top_signals.summary: Kathy Zeng, Chairwoman of Apple supplier Lingyi iTech, says the company has secured major clients in both the US and China as it expands into the humanoid robotics sector. She speaks with Bloomberg's Minmin Low on "Bloomberg: The China Show". (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Life inside Japan’s largest prison for women
top_signals.summary: Tochigi Prison, which houses 456 inmates, is a microcosm of what female prisons across the nation are facing, from a rising foreign population to mental health issues.

top_signals.title: Buzzcut backlash: AKB48 member’s termination stirs online furor
top_signals.summary: Mei Hanada's response video to her termination from idol group AKB48 echoes a scandal involving a different member of the pop outfit from 2013.
